perturbation.original_text: Subject to all other terms and conditions set forth herein, as of the date of this agreement, LEADER maintain the software for an additional five years.
perturbation.changed_text: Subject to all other terms and conditions set forth herein, as of the date of this agreement, LEADER shall maintain the software for an additional five years, contingent upon LEADER's continued satisfactory performance as determined solely by EZJR.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'contingent upon LEADER's continued satisfactory performance as determined solely by EZJR', the obligation of LEADER to maintain the software is now subject to EZJR's subjective evaluation. This contradicts the initial agreement for 'an additional five years', making the term of service uncertain and dependent on EZJR's discretion. This could lead to EZJR ending the maintenance agreement prematurely, regardless of the initial agreement for a fixed five-year period.
perturbation.contradicted_text: EXTENSION OF SERVICE AGREEMENT. Subject to all other terms and conditions set forth herein, as of the date of this agreement, LEADER shall maintain the software for an additional five years, contingent upon LEADER's continued satisfactory performance as determined solely by EZJR.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that LEADER shall maintain the software for an additional five years. The changed text introduces a contingency, making the maintenance dependent on LEADER's satisfactory performance as determined by EZJR. This creates a contradiction because the original agreement implies a fixed term, while the changed text introduces an element of uncertainty that could lead to a premature termination of services. The contradicted text contains the new changed text which means the contradiction is within the same text itself.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement among the parties, and supersedes all prior agreements, representations and understandings of the parties, relating to the subject matter of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement among the parties, except for any verbal agreements made separately between Barry Hall (EZJR) and Aymen Boughanmi (LEADER), and supersedes all prior written agreements, representations and understandings of the parties, relating to the subject matter of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'except for any verbal agreements made separately between Barry Hall (EZJR) and Aymen Boughanmi (LEADER)', the contract now recognizes the existence and potential validity of unwritten agreements. This directly contradicts the 'entire agreement' clause, which is designed to prevent reliance on any agreement outside of the written contract. This could create significant uncertainty and potential disputes, as either party could claim the existence of side agreements not documented in the contract.
perturbation.contradicted_text: ENTIRE AGREEMENT. This Agreement contains the entire agreement among the parties, except for any verbal agreements made separately between Barry Hall (EZJR) and Aymen Boughanmi (LEADER), and supersedes all prior written agreements, representations and understandings of the parties, relating to the subject matter of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces an exception to the 'entire agreement' clause by recognizing the validity of unwritten agreements between specific parties. This directly contradicts the fundamental purpose of an entire agreement clause, which is to limit the agreement to the written terms of the contract, thus creating a clear and direct conflict. The contradicted text, which is the changed text itself, highlights this contradiction, as the contract now acknowledges the possibility of side agreements not documented in the main body of the contract. This creates ambiguity and potential disputes, making the contract's enforceability questionable.
